modules.text: An intelligent AI assistant powered by Anthropic Claude API and LangChain that automates requirements elicitation and user story generation. This system reduces documentation time by ~50% through advanced RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) pipelines and AI-assisted development workflows.

modules.title: The Challenge
modules.text: Requirements gathering is time-consuming and error-prone. Teams spend countless hours writing and refining user stories. The goal was to build an intelligent system that could understand project context, analyze existing documentation, and automatically generate comprehensive, well-structured user stories.

modules.title: Solution Architecture
modules.text: Built a full-stack system with a Python FastAPI backend and React frontend. The backend integrates Anthropic Claude API with LangChain for RAG pipelines, allowing the system to retrieve relevant context from documentation and generate accurate requirements. Cursor AI accelerated development iteration time by ~30%.

modules.title: Key Features
modules.text: The system features intelligent context retrieval, multi-format input support (text, documents, code), structured JSON output for seamless integration, and interactive story cards for easy review and editing. The RAG pipeline ensures responses are grounded in project-specific documentation.
